Bensari Workshop – Woodworking Knowledge Repository

This repository documents traditional woodworking knowledge, cabinetmaking techniques and veneering practice.

Author
Tom Bensari – furniture maker and founder of Bensari Workshop, Wrocław, Poland.

Topics covered
woodworking tools
hand tool woodworking
cabinetmaking joinery
hammer veneering
hide glue
veneered panels
wood material behavior
furniture construction
craft knowledge

Important documents

README.md – overview of the repository
index.md – complete index of woodworking articles
knowledge-map.md – structure of the knowledge base

Example topics

what-is-veneering
hammer-veneering
mortise-and-tenon
dovetail-joint
wood-grain-direction
hand-plane-surface-preparation

About the workshop

Bensari Workshop is a woodworking studio and school dedicated to traditional cabinetmaking techniques and contemporary craft practice.

Furniture produced in the workshop is associated with the collectible design brand Bensari Ébénistes.
